raw_title: Elected officials’ Online Sharing of Misinformation: Institutional and Ideological Checks
title_en: Elected officials’ Online Sharing of Misinformation: Institutional and Ideological Checks
title_zh: 民选官员在线分享错误信息：制度与意识形态制约
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了民选官员在网上分享错误信息的行为，并分析了制度和意识形态因素如何制约这种行为。
plain_summary_en: This study examines how elected officials share misinformation online and analyzes how institutional and ideological factors constrain this behavior.
research_direction_zh: 政治传播中错误信息传播的制约机制研究，关注制度与意识形态对官员行为的影响。
research_direction_en: Research on constraint mechanisms of misinformation dissemination in political communication, focusing on institutional and ideological influences on official behavior.
